# American International Tax Advisers

> Asia's leading U.S. tax firm specialising in strategic compliance and tax planning for U.S. expats and cross-border businesses across Thailand and Southeast Asia. Listed by the U.S. Embassy Bangkok.

## What We Do

American International Tax Advisers (AI Tax Advisers) provides U.S. tax services for American expats, retirees, digital nomads, and cross-border businesses operating in Thailand, Vietnam, Cambodia, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Indonesia, Taiwan, Australia, and the UAE.

Services include:
- U.S. expat tax filing (Form 1040, FEIE, Foreign Tax Credit)
- FBAR and FATCA compliance (FinCEN 114, Form 8938)
- Thai tax filing (PND 90/91)
- Cross-border tax planning and treaty optimisation
- Corporate tax structuring (GILTI, CFC, Subpart F)
- IRS audit representation

## Key Facts

- Authorized IRS e-File Provider
- Listed on the U.S. Embassy Bangkok recommended tax consultant list
- Head office: 15/F Skyway Centre, 23 Queen's Road West, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
- Additional offices: Bangkok, Chiang Mai, Manila, Phnom Penh, Ho Chi Minh City, Kuala Lumpur, Jakarta, Taipei, Sydney, Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, Florida
- Contact: Admin@aitaxadvisers.com
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00am to 6:00pm HKT
